examples.en: Have you seen my toothbrush?
examples.zh: 你有看到我的牙刷嗎?

examples.en: I need to buy a new toothbrush.
examples.zh: 我需要買一支新牙刷。

examples.en: Can you pass me a towel?
examples.zh: 可以遞給我一條毛巾嗎?

examples.en: The towels are in the bathroom.
examples.zh: 毛巾在浴室裡。

examples.en: This pillow is too soft for me.
examples.zh: 這個枕頭對我來說太軟了。

examples.en: I hugged my pillow and fell asleep.
examples.zh: 我抱著枕頭就睡著了。

examples.en: It's cold, grab a blanket.
examples.zh: 很冷,拿條毯子吧。

examples.en: She pulled the blanket over her head.
examples.zh: 她把毯子拉過頭頂。

examples.en: Mom is cooking in the kitchen.
examples.zh: 媽媽正在廚房煮飯。

examples.en: Let's clean the kitchen after dinner.
examples.zh: 晚餐後我們來打掃廚房。

examples.en: Put the milk back in the fridge.
examples.zh: 把牛奶放回冰箱。

examples.en: There's nothing to eat in the fridge.
examples.zh: 冰箱裡沒東西可吃。

examples.en: Can you take out the trash?
examples.zh: 你可以去倒垃圾嗎?

examples.en: The trash smells really bad.
examples.zh: 垃圾聞起來很臭。

examples.en: I have to do the laundry today.
examples.zh: 我今天得洗衣服。

examples.en: The laundry is still wet.
examples.zh: 衣服還是濕的。

examples.en: Where do you keep the broom?
examples.zh: 你把掃把放在哪裡?

examples.en: Hand me the broom, please.
examples.zh: 請把掃把遞給我。

examples.en: Your socks are in the top drawer.
examples.zh: 你的襪子在最上面的抽屜。

examples.en: The drawer is stuck again.
examples.zh: 抽屜又卡住了。

examples.en: Please turn off the faucet.
examples.zh: 請把水龍頭關掉。

examples.en: The faucet is dripping.
examples.zh: 水龍頭在滴水。

examples.en: Heat it up in the microwave.
examples.zh: 用微波爐把它加熱。

examples.en: The microwave beeped twice.
examples.zh: 微波爐響了兩聲。

examples.en: I need to vacuum the living room.
examples.zh: 我需要用吸塵器打掃客廳。

examples.en: Can you vacuum the carpet?
examples.zh: 你可以吸一下地毯嗎?

examples.en: I'll sweep the floor after lunch.
examples.zh: 午餐後我會掃地。

examples.en: Please sweep up the crumbs.
examples.zh: 請把碎屑掃乾淨。

examples.en: I changed the pillowcase this morning.
examples.zh: 我今天早上換了枕頭套。

examples.en: This pillowcase is really soft.
examples.zh: 這個枕頭套很柔軟。

examples.en: Let's tidy up before the guests arrive.
examples.zh: 客人到之前我們來收拾一下。

examples.en: Please tidy up your room.
examples.zh: 請把你的房間整理好。

examples.en: It's your turn to do the dishes.
examples.zh: 輪到你洗碗了。

examples.en: I'll do the dishes if you cook.
examples.zh: 你煮飯的話我來洗碗。

examples.en: Don't forget to take out the trash.
examples.zh: 別忘了倒垃圾。

examples.en: He always forgets to take out the trash.
examples.zh: 他總是忘記倒垃圾。

examples.en: I make the bed every morning.
examples.zh: 我每天早上整理床鋪。

examples.en: Did you make the bed today?
examples.zh: 你今天鋪床了嗎?

examples.en: Turn off the lights before you leave.
examples.zh: 離開前把燈關掉。

examples.en: Please turn off the TV.
examples.zh: 請把電視關掉。

examples.en: Don't forget to plug in your phone.
examples.zh: 別忘了幫手機插電。

examples.en: Can you plug in the kettle?
examples.zh: 你可以幫熱水壺插電嗎?

examples.en: You can throw away that old box.
examples.zh: 那個舊箱子你可以丟掉。

examples.en: Don't throw away the receipt.
examples.zh: 別把收據丟掉。

examples.en: Let's clean up this mess together.
examples.zh: 我們一起把這團亂收拾乾淨吧。

examples.en: Clean up after you cook.
examples.zh: 煮完飯後要收拾乾淨。

examples.en: Put away your toys, please.
examples.zh: 請把你的玩具收好。

examples.en: I'll put away the groceries.
examples.zh: 我來把買的東西收好。

examples.en: This kitchen appliance saves a lot of time.
examples.zh: 這個廚房家電省了很多時間。

examples.en: We bought new appliances for the house.
examples.zh: 我們為家裡買了新家電。

examples.en: I'm going to buy some groceries.
examples.zh: 我要去買一些食品雜貨。

examples.en: The grocery store closes at ten.
examples.zh: 雜貨店十點關門。

examples.en: Brushing my teeth is part of my morning routine.
examples.zh: 刷牙是我早晨例行公事的一部分。

examples.en: I like sticking to my daily routine.
examples.zh: 我喜歡照著我的日常作息走。

examples.en: Sorry, my room is a bit messy.
examples.zh: 抱歉,我的房間有點亂。

examples.en: The desk looks really messy.
examples.zh: 這張桌子看起來很亂。

examples.en: This apartment feels really cozy.
examples.zh: 這間公寓感覺很溫馨。

examples.en: Let's make the room cozy for winter.
examples.zh: 我們把房間佈置得溫馨過冬吧。

examples.en: It's stuffy in here, open a window.
examples.zh: 這裡很悶,開個窗吧。

examples.en: The room got stuffy overnight.
examples.zh: 房間一整晚變得很悶。

examples.en: She keeps her kitchen spotless.
examples.zh: 她的廚房總是一塵不染。

examples.en: The floor is spotless now.
examples.zh: 地板現在乾淨得發亮。

examples.en: Defrost the chicken before you cook it.
examples.zh: 煮之前先把雞肉解凍。

examples.en: I forgot to defrost the meat.
examples.zh: 我忘了把肉解凍。

examples.en: Rinse the cup before you use it.
examples.zh: 用杯子前先沖一下。

examples.en: Please rinse the vegetables well.
examples.zh: 請把蔬菜沖洗乾淨。

examples.en: I had to scrub the pan really hard.
examples.zh: 我得用力刷洗這個鍋子。

examples.en: Scrub the sink until it shines.
examples.zh: 把水槽刷到發亮。

examples.en: I want to declutter my closet this weekend.
examples.zh: 這週末我想清理我的衣櫃。

examples.en: Decluttering makes me feel better.
examples.zh: 清理雜物讓我感覺更好。

examples.en: The dishes are starting to pile up.
examples.zh: 碗盤開始堆積起來了。

examples.en: Don't let the laundry pile up.
examples.zh: 別讓待洗衣物堆積起來。

examples.en: Wipe down the counter after cooking.
examples.zh: 煮完飯後把流理台擦乾淨。

examples.en: I wiped down the table before dinner.
examples.zh: 晚餐前我把桌子擦乾淨了。

examples.en: Let's stock up on toilet paper.
examples.zh: 我們來囤點衛生紙吧。

examples.en: I stocked up on snacks for the week.
examples.zh: 我囤了這週要吃的零食。

examples.en: I need to dust off the shelves.
examples.zh: 我需要把架子上的灰塵撢掉。

examples.en: Dust off the fan before summer.
examples.zh: 夏天前把電風扇的灰塵撢掉。

examples.en: Her shelf is full of cute knick-knacks.
examples.zh: 她的架子上放滿了可愛的小擺飾。

examples.en: I collect little knick-knacks from trips.
examples.zh: 我會收集旅行帶回的小玩意。

examples.en: There's too much clutter on my desk.
examples.zh: 我的桌上有太多雜物了。

examples.en: Let's get rid of the clutter.
examples.zh: 我們把雜物清掉吧。

examples.en: Everyone in the household helps clean.
examples.zh: 家裡每個人都幫忙打掃。

examples.en: We share the household expenses.
examples.zh: 我們一起分擔家用開銷。

examples.en: Remember to disinfect the doorknobs.
examples.zh: 記得把門把消毒。

examples.en: I disinfect the kitchen every week.
examples.zh: 我每週都會把廚房消毒。

examples.en: We had to unclog the kitchen sink.
examples.zh: 我們得疏通廚房的水槽。

examples.en: Can you help me unclog the drain?
examples.zh: 你可以幫我疏通排水孔嗎?

examples.en: She tucks the kids in every night.
examples.zh: 她每晚哄孩子上床睡覺。

examples.en: Tuck in the sheets neatly.
examples.zh: 把床單整齊地塞好。

examples.en: Let's air out the room for a while.
examples.zh: 我們讓房間通風一下。

examples.en: I air out the blankets on sunny days.
examples.zh: 天氣好時我會把被子拿去透氣。

examples.en: The garage is too cluttered to park in.
examples.zh: 車庫太亂了,根本停不了車。

examples.en: Her desk is always cluttered with papers.
examples.zh: 她的桌上總是堆滿了紙。

examples.en: I'll put the kettle on for some tea.
examples.zh: 我來燒水泡點茶。

examples.en: Put the kettle on, I'm freezing.
examples.zh: 去燒水吧,我快冷死了。

examples.en: Let's go over the agenda before we start.
examples.zh: 開始前我們先看一下議程。

examples.en: Can you send me the agenda for tomorrow's meeting?
examples.zh: 你可以把明天會議的議程寄給我嗎?

examples.en: I'll ask my colleague to help with this task.
examples.zh: 我會請我的同事幫忙這個任務。

examples.en: She's a colleague from the marketing team.
examples.zh: 她是行銷團隊的同事。

examples.en: The project is due at the end of the month.
examples.zh: 這個專案月底要交。

examples.en: I'm working on a new project this week.
examples.zh: 我這週在做一個新專案。

examples.en: We have a meeting at three o'clock.
examples.zh: 我們三點有一場會議。

examples.en: The meeting was moved to Friday.
examples.zh: 會議改到星期五了。

examples.en: Let me check my schedule first.
examples.zh: 讓我先看一下我的行程。

examples.en: Can we schedule a call for Monday?
examples.zh: 我們可以安排星期一通話嗎?

examples.en: I need to finish this report by noon.
examples.zh: 我需要在中午前完成這份報告。

examples.en: Please report the results to your manager.
examples.zh: 請把結果向你的主管報告。

examples.en: My manager approved the budget.
examples.zh: 我的主管批准了預算。

examples.en: You should talk to your manager about it.
examples.zh: 你應該和你的主管談談這件事。

examples.en: The client wants to see the new design.
examples.zh: 客戶想看新的設計。

examples.en: We have a call with the client this afternoon.
examples.zh: 我們今天下午和客戶有通話。

examples.en: I'll send you an email with the details.
examples.zh: 我會寄一封含細節的電子郵件給你。

examples.en: Did you get my email yesterday?
examples.zh: 你昨天有收到我的電子郵件嗎?

examples.en: This task will take about two hours.
examples.zh: 這個任務大約需要兩小時。

examples.en: I've finished all my tasks for today.
examples.zh: 我今天所有的任務都完成了。

examples.en: Our team is working really well together.
examples.zh: 我們團隊合作得很好。

examples.en: She just joined our team last week.
examples.zh: 她上週剛加入我們團隊。

examples.en: I'll be at the office by nine.
examples.zh: 我九點前會到辦公室。

examples.en: Our office moved to a new building.
examples.zh: 我們辦公室搬到新大樓了。

examples.en: I attached the file to this email.
examples.zh: 我把檔案附在這封郵件裡了。

examples.en: Please attach the report before sending.
examples.zh: 寄出前請附上報告。

examples.en: I'll reply to your email later today.
examples.zh: 我今天稍晚會回覆你的郵件。

examples.en: Thanks for your quick reply.
examples.zh: 謝謝你這麼快回覆。

examples.en: Can you confirm the time of the meeting?
examples.zh: 你可以確認一下會議時間嗎?

examples.en: I just want to confirm the details.
examples.zh: 我只是想確認一下細節。

examples.en: Let's discuss this in the meeting.
examples.zh: 我們在會議中討論這件事吧。

examples.en: We need to discuss the new plan.
examples.zh: 我們需要討論一下新計畫。

examples.en: Can you give me an update on the project?
examples.zh: 你可以跟我說一下專案的最新進度嗎?

examples.en: I'll update the file this afternoon.
examples.zh: 我今天下午會更新檔案。

examples.en: What are the deliverables for this phase?
examples.zh: 這個階段的交付成果是什麼?

examples.en: The main deliverable is the final report.
examples.zh: 主要的交付成果是最終報告。

examples.en: I'm giving a presentation to the client tomorrow.
examples.zh: 我明天要向客戶做簡報。

examples.en: Her presentation was clear and short.
examples.zh: 她的簡報清楚又簡短。

examples.en: Thanks for your feedback on the draft.
examples.zh: 謝謝你對草稿的回饋。

examples.en: I'd love to hear your feedback.
examples.zh: 我很想聽聽你的意見。

examples.en: All attendees should join the call on time.
examples.zh: 所有與會者應準時加入通話。

examples.en: How many attendees do we expect?
examples.zh: 我們預計有多少與會者?

examples.en: Can you forward that email to me?
examples.zh: 你可以把那封郵件轉寄給我嗎?

examples.en: I'll forward the message to the whole team.
examples.zh: 我會把訊息轉寄給整個團隊。

examples.en: I'll send you a first draft by Friday.
examples.zh: 我星期五前會給你第一版草稿。

examples.en: This is just a rough draft.
examples.zh: 這只是個粗略的草稿。

examples.en: The manager assigned the task to me.
examples.zh: 經理把這個任務指派給我。

examples.en: Who is assigned to this project?
examples.zh: 誰被指派負責這個專案?

examples.en: Please send the invoice by the end of the week.
examples.zh: 請在本週末前寄出請款單。

examples.en: We haven't received the invoice yet.
examples.zh: 我們還沒收到請款單。

examples.en: We need to stay within the budget.
examples.zh: 我們必須控制在預算內。

examples.en: The budget for this project is quite tight.
examples.zh: 這個專案的預算相當緊。

examples.en: Please remind me to call the client.
examples.zh: 請提醒我打電話給客戶。

examples.en: Just a quick reminder about tomorrow's meeting.
examples.zh: 只是快速提醒一下明天的會議。

examples.en: We sent the proposal to the client yesterday.
examples.zh: 我們昨天把提案寄給客戶了。

examples.en: The proposal needs a few small changes.
examples.zh: 這份提案需要一些小修改。

examples.en: Could you take the minutes for this meeting?
examples.zh: 你可以做這場會議的記錄嗎?

examples.en: I'll share the minutes after the call.
examples.zh: 通話後我會分享會議記錄。

examples.en: We need to prioritize the urgent tasks first.
examples.zh: 我們需要先排定緊急任務的優先順序。

examples.en: Let's prioritize the client's request.
examples.zh: 我們把客戶的需求列為優先吧。

examples.en: You should delegate some tasks to your team.
examples.zh: 你應該把一些工作分派給團隊。

examples.en: He's learning how to delegate more.
examples.zh: 他正在學習如何多授權。

examples.en: We need to update all the stakeholders.
examples.zh: 我們需要向所有利害關係人更新進度。

examples.en: The stakeholders approved the plan.
examples.zh: 利害關係人批准了這個計畫。

examples.en: We just hit an important project milestone.
examples.zh: 我們剛達成一個重要的專案里程碑。

examples.en: The next milestone is due next month.
examples.zh: 下一個里程碑下個月到期。

examples.en: Let's align on the goals before we start.
examples.zh: 開始前我們先對目標取得一致。

examples.en: We need to align with the sales team.
examples.zh: 我們需要和業務團隊達成一致。

examples.en: Her onboarding starts on Monday.
examples.zh: 她的新人培訓從星期一開始。

examples.en: We improved the onboarding process this year.
examples.zh: 我們今年改善了新人培訓流程。

examples.en: That request is outside the project scope.
examples.zh: 那個要求超出了專案範圍。

examples.en: Let's define the scope clearly first.
examples.zh: 我們先把範圍界定清楚。

examples.en: We may need to escalate this issue to management.
examples.zh: 我們可能需要把這個問題上報給管理層。

examples.en: Let's escalate it if the client isn't happy.
examples.zh: 如果客戶不滿意,我們就上報處理。

examples.en: Please give me actionable feedback.
examples.zh: 請給我可執行的回饋。

examples.en: We need actionable steps, not just ideas.
examples.zh: 我們需要可執行的步驟,而不只是想法。

examples.en: I don't have the bandwidth for another project.
examples.zh: 我沒有餘力再接一個專案了。

examples.en: Do you have bandwidth to help this week?
examples.zh: 你這週有餘力幫忙嗎?

examples.en: We can leverage our existing tools for this.
examples.zh: 我們可以善用現有的工具來做這件事。

examples.en: Let's leverage the team's experience.
examples.zh: 我們來運用團隊的經驗。

examples.en: Let me give you a quick recap of the meeting.
examples.zh: 讓我快速回顧一下會議重點。

examples.en: Here's a recap of what we agreed on.
examples.zh: 這是我們達成共識的重點回顧。

examples.en: Let's loop in the finance team on this.
examples.zh: 我們讓財務團隊也加入了解這件事。

examples.en: Please loop me in on that email thread.
examples.zh: 請把我加進那個郵件討論串。

examples.en: Let's touch base after lunch.
examples.zh: 我們午餐後聯繫一下。

examples.en: I wanted to touch base about the project.
examples.zh: 我想就這個專案和你簡短溝通一下。

examples.en: Can you take the lead on this project?
examples.zh: 你可以帶頭負責這個專案嗎?

examples.en: She took the lead during the meeting.
examples.zh: 她在會議中帶頭主導。

examples.en: Let me run this idea by my manager.
examples.zh: 讓我把這個想法徵詢一下我主管的意見。

examples.en: Can I run something by you real quick?
examples.zh: 我可以快速徵詢你一下意見嗎?

examples.en: We need to get to the airport three hours early.
examples.zh: 我們需要提早三小時到機場。

examples.en: The airport was crowded with tourists.
examples.zh: 機場擠滿了觀光客。

examples.en: Don't forget your passport at the hotel.
examples.zh: 別把護照忘在飯店。

examples.en: Please show me your passport.
examples.zh: 請出示您的護照。

examples.en: I bought a one-way ticket to Tokyo.
examples.zh: 我買了一張到東京的單程票。

examples.en: Where can I buy a train ticket?
examples.zh: 我在哪裡可以買火車票?

examples.en: Our hotel is right next to the beach.
examples.zh: 我們的飯店就在海灘旁邊。

examples.en: Is breakfast included at this hotel?
examples.zh: 這間飯店有含早餐嗎?

examples.en: My luggage didn't arrive on the flight.
examples.zh: 我的行李沒有跟著班機到達。

examples.en: Can I leave my luggage here?
examples.zh: 我可以把行李寄放在這裡嗎?

examples.en: Can you show me on the map?
examples.zh: 你可以在地圖上指給我看嗎?

examples.en: I always carry a paper map when I travel.
examples.zh: 旅行時我總是帶著紙本地圖。

examples.en: Which bus goes to the city center?
examples.zh: 哪一班公車到市中心?

examples.en: We missed the last bus.
examples.zh: 我們錯過了末班公車。

examples.en: The train leaves at nine sharp.
examples.zh: 火車九點整開。

examples.en: Let's take the train instead of driving.
examples.zh: 我們搭火車吧,別開車了。

examples.en: Let's grab a taxi to the station.
examples.zh: 我們攔輛計程車去車站吧。

examples.en: How much is a taxi to the airport?
examples.zh: 搭計程車到機場多少錢?

examples.en: The station is just around the corner.
examples.zh: 車站就在轉角。

examples.en: I'll meet you at the station.
examples.zh: 我在車站跟你碰面。

examples.en: Our flight was delayed by two hours.
examples.zh: 我們的航班延誤了兩個小時。

examples.en: What time does your flight take off?
examples.zh: 你的航班幾點起飛?

examples.en: I'd like a room with a sea view.
examples.zh: 我想要一間有海景的房間。

examples.en: Our room isn't ready yet.
examples.zh: 我們的房間還沒準備好。

examples.en: My suitcase is too heavy to lift.
examples.zh: 我的行李箱太重了抬不動。

examples.en: She packed her suitcase the night before.
examples.zh: 她前一晚就打包好了行李箱。

examples.en: This street is full of tourists in summer.
examples.zh: 這條街夏天擠滿了觀光客。

examples.en: A friendly tourist helped me find the way.
examples.zh: 一位友善的觀光客幫我找到路。

examples.en: Take the subway to save time.
examples.zh: 搭地鐵比較省時間。

examples.en: The subway is packed during rush hour.
examples.zh: 尖峰時段地鐵很擠。

examples.en: Our boarding gate has changed to B12.
examples.zh: 我們的登機門改到 B12 了。

examples.en: Please go to the gate now.
examples.zh: 請現在前往登機門。

examples.en: Have your boarding pass ready at the gate.
examples.zh: 在登機門請準備好登機證。

examples.en: I lost my boarding pass somewhere.
examples.zh: 我把登機證弄丟在某處了。

examples.en: We waited in a long line at customs.
examples.zh: 我們在海關排了很長的隊。

examples.en: Do I have to declare this at customs?
examples.zh: 這個我需要向海關申報嗎?

examples.en: Check the departure board for your gate.
examples.zh: 看出發看板找你的登機門。

examples.en: The departure time is printed on your ticket.
examples.zh: 出發時間印在你的票上。

examples.en: Meet me at the arrival hall.
examples.zh: 到入境大廳跟我碰面。

examples.en: Our arrival was delayed by bad weather.
examples.zh: 我們因為壞天氣而延遲抵達。

examples.en: I have a reservation under Chen.
examples.zh: 我有一筆以陳姓登記的預訂。

examples.en: Do you have a dinner reservation tonight?
examples.zh: 你今晚有訂位嗎?

examples.en: The train departs from platform three.
examples.zh: 火車從三號月台出發。

examples.en: Wait behind the yellow line on the platform.
examples.zh: 在月台上請站在黃線後方。

examples.en: I'll wait for you in the hotel lobby.
examples.zh: 我在飯店大廳等你。

examples.en: The lobby has free Wi-Fi.
examples.zh: 大廳有免費無線網路。

examples.en: The receptionist gave us a free upgrade.
examples.zh: 接待員給了我們免費升等。

examples.en: Ask the receptionist for a city map.
examples.zh: 跟接待員要一張市區地圖。

examples.en: I only need a one-way ticket.
examples.zh: 我只需要單程票。

examples.en: A one-way trip is cheaper this time.
examples.zh: 這次單程比較便宜。

examples.en: A round-trip fare saves us money.
examples.zh: 來回票幫我們省錢。

examples.en: I booked a round-trip flight to Seoul.
examples.zh: 我訂了一張到首爾的來回機票。

examples.en: The taxi fare came to twelve dollars.
examples.zh: 計程車車資是十二美元。

examples.en: Bus fares went up last month.
examples.zh: 公車票價上個月漲了。

examples.en: You have to transfer at the next stop.
examples.zh: 你必須在下一站轉乘。

examples.en: We transferred to a different line downtown.
examples.zh: 我們在市區換乘另一條線。

examples.en: We spent the whole day sightseeing.
examples.zh: 我們花了一整天觀光。

examples.en: Is there a sightseeing bus around here?
examples.zh: 這附近有觀光巴士嗎?

examples.en: That tower is a famous city landmark.
examples.zh: 那座塔是有名的城市地標。

examples.en: Use the church as a landmark to find us.
examples.zh: 用那座教堂當地標來找我們。

examples.en: I always ask for an aisle seat.
examples.zh: 我總是要求走道座位。

examples.en: An aisle seat makes it easy to stretch.
examples.zh: 走道座位方便伸展。

examples.en: The sign said no vacancy tonight.
examples.zh: 招牌寫著今晚客滿。

examples.en: Do you have any vacancies this weekend?
examples.zh: 這週末你們有空房嗎?

examples.en: Where can I exchange foreign currency?
examples.zh: 我可以在哪裡換外幣?

examples.en: What's the local currency here?
examples.zh: 這裡的當地貨幣是什麼?

examples.en: The guidebook recommended this little café.
examples.zh: 旅遊指南推薦了這家小咖啡館。

examples.en: I read the guidebook on the plane.
examples.zh: 我在飛機上讀旅遊指南。

examples.en: Our flight leaves from Terminal 2.
examples.zh: 我們的班機從第二航廈起飛。

examples.en: Take the shuttle between terminals.
examples.zh: 搭接駁車在各航廈間移動。

examples.en: Check-out is at eleven in the morning.
examples.zh: 退房時間是早上十一點。

examples.en: Can we have a late check-out?
examples.zh: 我們可以延遲退房嗎?

examples.en: We took a detour around the flooded road.
examples.zh: 我們繞道避開淹水的路。

examples.en: There's a detour ahead due to construction.
examples.zh: 前方因施工需繞道。

examples.en: Boarding will begin in ten minutes.
examples.zh: 十分鐘後開始登機。

examples.en: They announced boarding for our flight.
examples.zh: 他們廣播我們班機開始登機。

examples.en: We barely made our connecting flight.
examples.zh: 我們差點趕不上轉機航班。

examples.en: My connecting flight is in another terminal.
examples.zh: 我的轉機航班在另一個航廈。

examples.en: The room amenities include a coffee maker.
examples.zh: 房間備品包含一台咖啡機。

examples.en: This hostel has surprisingly good amenities.
examples.zh: 這間青年旅館的設施出乎意料地好。

examples.en: The concierge booked us a table.
examples.zh: 禮賓服務員幫我們訂了位子。

examples.en: Ask the concierge for restaurant tips.
examples.zh: 跟禮賓人員問餐廳推薦。

examples.en: Fill out the customs declaration before landing.
examples.zh: 降落前填好海關申報單。

examples.en: He forgot to sign the customs declaration.
examples.zh: 他忘了在海關申報單上簽名。

examples.en: We joined a day excursion to the islands.
examples.zh: 我們參加了到島嶼的一日短途旅行。

examples.en: The hotel offers guided excursions.
examples.zh: 飯店提供有導遊的短途行程。

examples.en: This is a pedestrian-only street.
examples.zh: 這是行人專用街道。

examples.en: Pedestrians have the right of way here.
examples.zh: 這裡行人有優先通行權。

examples.en: Turn left at the next intersection.
examples.zh: 在下一個十字路口左轉。

examples.en: The museum is right past that intersection.
examples.zh: 博物館就在那個十字路口過去一點。

examples.en: We found cheap accommodation near the beach.
examples.zh: 我們在海灘附近找到便宜的住宿。

examples.en: Does the price include accommodation?
examples.zh: 這價格有含住宿嗎?

examples.en: A free shuttle runs to the airport hourly.
examples.zh: 有免費接駁車每小時開往機場。

examples.en: We caught the shuttle from the hotel.
examples.zh: 我們搭了飯店的接駁車。

examples.en: Tap your card at the turnstile.
examples.zh: 在閘門感應你的卡。

examples.en: The turnstile wouldn't let me through.
examples.zh: 閘門不讓我通過。

examples.en: They went on a hiking expedition in the mountains.
examples.zh: 他們去山裡進行健行探險。

examples.en: Our expedition lasted a whole week.
examples.zh: 我們的探險旅行持續了整整一週。

examples.en: Could I see the menu, please?
examples.zh: 可以給我看菜單嗎?

examples.en: The menu has lots of vegetarian options.
examples.zh: 這份菜單有很多素食選擇。

examples.en: Are you ready to order?
examples.zh: 你準備好點餐了嗎?

examples.en: I'd like to order the grilled chicken.
examples.zh: 我想點烤雞。

examples.en: The waiter brought us some water.
examples.zh: 服務生給我們送來了水。

examples.en: Let's ask the waiter for the bill.
examples.zh: 我們來請服務生結帳吧。

examples.en: Can we get the bill, please?
examples.zh: 可以幫我們結帳嗎?

examples.en: Let me pay the bill this time.
examples.zh: 這次讓我來付帳。

examples.en: We left a generous tip for the waiter.
examples.zh: 我們給服務生留了不少小費。

examples.en: Is the tip already included?
examples.zh: 小費已經包含在內了嗎?

examples.en: Let's share an appetizer before the main course.
examples.zh: 主餐前我們來分享一道開胃菜吧。

examples.en: The soup came as a free appetizer.
examples.zh: 這碗湯是免費的開胃菜。

examples.en: What would you like for your main course?
examples.zh: 你的主餐想要點什麼?

examples.en: The steak is our most popular main course.
examples.zh: 這道牛排是我們最受歡迎的主餐。

examples.en: Do you have room for dessert?
examples.zh: 你還吃得下甜點嗎?

examples.en: The chocolate cake is a great dessert.
examples.zh: 這款巧克力蛋糕是很棒的甜點。

examples.en: This curry is a little too spicy for me.
examples.zh: 這道咖哩對我來說有點太辣了。

examples.en: Can you make it less spicy?
examples.zh: 可以做得不那麼辣嗎?

examples.en: This tea is really sweet.
examples.zh: 這杯茶真的很甜。

examples.en: I don't like my coffee too sweet.
examples.zh: 我不喜歡咖啡太甜。

examples.en: The lemon sauce tastes a bit sour.
examples.zh: 這檸檬醬吃起來有點酸。

examples.en: I love the sour flavor of this soup.
examples.zh: 我很喜歡這道湯的酸味。

examples.en: The fries are a bit too salty.
examples.zh: 這薯條有點太鹹了。

examples.en: This soup is perfectly salty.
examples.zh: 這碗湯鹹度剛剛好。

examples.en: This dark coffee is quite bitter.
examples.zh: 這杯深焙咖啡相當苦。

examples.en: Some people enjoy bitter chocolate.
examples.zh: 有些人喜歡苦味巧克力。

examples.en: The salad is made with fresh vegetables.
examples.zh: 這道沙拉是用新鮮蔬菜做的。

examples.en: These fish are really fresh today.
examples.zh: 今天這些魚很新鮮。

examples.en: I'll have the beef noodle soup.
examples.zh: 我要點牛肉麵。

examples.en: How would you like your beef cooked?
examples.zh: 你的牛肉要幾分熟?

examples.en: The pork dumplings are delicious here.
examples.zh: 這裡的豬肉水餃很好吃。

examples.en: Is this dish made with pork?
examples.zh: 這道菜是用豬肉做的嗎?

examples.en: This restaurant is famous for its seafood.
examples.zh: 這家餐廳以海鮮聞名。

examples.en: I'm allergic to some seafood.
examples.zh: 我對某些海鮮過敏。

examples.en: Please add more vegetables to my noodles.
examples.zh: 請幫我的麵多加一些蔬菜。

examples.en: Fresh vegetables make the dish healthier.
examples.zh: 新鮮蔬菜讓這道菜更健康。

examples.en: What ingredients are in this sauce?
examples.zh: 這醬料裡有哪些食材?

examples.en: We only use fresh ingredients.
examples.zh: 我們只使用新鮮食材。

examples.en: This soup has a rich flavor.
examples.zh: 這碗湯風味濃郁。

examples.en: Which ice cream flavor do you want?
examples.zh: 你想要哪種口味的冰淇淋?

examples.en: One serving is enough for me.
examples.zh: 一份對我來說就夠了。

examples.en: This dish comes in a large serving.
examples.zh: 這道菜的分量很大。

examples.en: The portion here is quite generous.
examples.zh: 這裡的份量相當大方。

examples.en: Can I get a smaller portion?
examples.zh: 我可以要小份一點的嗎?

examples.en: I'd like my steak medium rare.
examples.zh: 我的牛排要五分熟。

examples.en: Medium rare is the chef's recommendation.
examples.zh: 五分熟是主廚推薦的熟度。

examples.en: Is the coffee refill free?
examples.zh: 咖啡續杯免費嗎?

examples.en: Can I get a refill on my soda?
examples.zh: 我的汽水可以續杯嗎?

examples.en: I'll have a hot latte, please.
examples.zh: 我要一杯熱拿鐵,謝謝。

examples.en: Their oat milk latte is amazing.
examples.zh: 他們的燕麥奶拿鐵超棒。

examples.en: A single espresso wakes me right up.
examples.zh: 一杯濃縮咖啡就能讓我清醒。

examples.en: Can I add an extra shot of espresso?
examples.zh: 我可以多加一份濃縮咖啡嗎?

examples.en: They brew the coffee fresh every morning.
examples.zh: 他們每天早上現沖咖啡。

examples.en: This tea needs a few minutes to brew.
examples.zh: 這茶需要幾分鐘來沖泡。

examples.en: I'll have a decaf, it's getting late.
examples.zh: 我要低咖啡因的,時間不早了。

examples.en: Do you serve decaf here?
examples.zh: 你們這裡有賣低咖啡因咖啡嗎?

examples.en: The barista made a lovely design in my latte.
examples.zh: 咖啡師在我的拿鐵上拉了漂亮的花。

examples.en: Ask the barista for extra foam.
examples.zh: 跟咖啡師要多一點奶泡。

examples.en: I ordered a mango smoothie.
examples.zh: 我點了一杯芒果果昔。

examples.en: This smoothie is thick and creamy.
examples.zh: 這杯果昔又濃又滑。

examples.en: I'll have sparkling water, please.
examples.zh: 我要氣泡水,謝謝。

examples.en: Would you like still or sparkling water?
examples.zh: 您要無氣泡還是氣泡水?

examples.en: The beverage menu is on the last page.
examples.zh: 飲料單在最後一頁。

examples.en: A cold beverage sounds great right now.
examples.zh: 現在來杯冷飲聽起來很棒。

examples.en: Let's grab a quick snack.
examples.zh: 我們去買點小點心吧。

examples.en: These fries are a nice afternoon snack.
examples.zh: 這些薯條是不錯的下午點心。

examples.en: I'll take the grilled salmon.
examples.zh: 我要點烤鮭魚。

examples.en: Grilled vegetables are a healthy choice.
examples.zh: 烤蔬菜是很健康的選擇。

examples.en: The fried chicken here is crispy.
examples.zh: 這裡的炸雞很酥脆。

examples.en: I try to avoid fried food.
examples.zh: 我盡量避免油炸食物。

examples.en: The steamed dumplings are my favorite.
examples.zh: 蒸餃是我的最愛。

examples.en: I'd prefer the fish steamed.
examples.zh: 我比較想要清蒸的魚。

examples.en: Do you have any vegetarian dishes?
examples.zh: 你們有素食料理嗎?

examples.en: My friend is vegetarian.
examples.zh: 我朋友吃素。

examples.en: I have a peanut allergy.
examples.zh: 我對花生過敏。

examples.en: Please tell us about any food allergy.
examples.zh: 請告訴我們任何食物過敏情況。

examples.en: Can I have some extra sauce?
examples.zh: 可以多給我一些醬料嗎?

examples.en: The pasta comes with a creamy sauce.
examples.zh: 這道義大利麵配奶油醬。

examples.en: I feel like having pasta tonight.
examples.zh: 我今晚想吃義大利麵。

examples.en: This pasta is cooked perfectly.
examples.zh: 這義大利麵煮得剛剛好。

examples.en: What side dish comes with the burger?
examples.zh: 這漢堡配什麼配菜?

examples.en: I'll add a salad as a side dish.
examples.zh: 我要加一份沙拉當配菜。

examples.en: I'll get the burger combo.
examples.zh: 我要點漢堡套餐。

examples.en: The combo comes with fries and a drink.
examples.zh: 這套餐附薯條和一杯飲料。

examples.en: I'll have a medium coffee.
examples.zh: 我要一杯中杯咖啡。

examples.en: Cook the steak to medium, please.
examples.zh: 這牛排請煮到七分熟。

examples.en: What toppings do you want on your pizza?
examples.zh: 你的披薩要加什麼配料?

examples.en: Extra cheese is my favorite topping.
examples.zh: 多加起司是我最愛的配料。

examples.en: I love how crispy these fries are.
examples.zh: 我喜歡這些薯條這麼酥脆。

examples.en: The chicken skin is nice and crispy.
examples.zh: 這雞皮又香又脆。

examples.en: Everything on the table looks delicious.
examples.zh: 桌上每道菜看起來都很美味。

examples.en: That was a delicious meal, thank you.
examples.zh: 那頓飯很美味,謝謝。

examples.en: What's the most popular dish here?
examples.zh: 這裡最受歡迎的菜是哪道?

examples.en: This dish is the chef's specialty.
examples.zh: 這道菜是主廚的招牌。

examples.en: I'm so happy you came to my party!
examples.zh: 你來我的派對我好開心!

examples.en: She looked really happy after the good news.
examples.zh: 聽到好消息後她看起來很開心。

examples.en: He felt sad when his friend moved away.
examples.zh: 朋友搬走時他很難過。

examples.en: Don't be sad, things will get better.
examples.zh: 別難過,事情會好轉的。

examples.en: My mom got angry when I broke the vase.
examples.zh: 我打破花瓶時媽媽很生氣。

examples.en: Why are you so angry with me?
examples.zh: 你為什麼這麼生我的氣?

examples.en: I was scared of the dark as a kid.
examples.zh: 我小時候怕黑。

examples.en: Don't be scared, I'm right here.
examples.zh: 別怕,我就在這裡。

examples.en: She's too shy to speak in class.
examples.zh: 她太害羞了,不敢在課堂上發言。

examples.en: Don't be shy, come and say hi!
examples.zh: 別害羞,過來打個招呼!

examples.en: The new student is very friendly.
examples.zh: 那位新同學很友善。

examples.en: Everyone here is so friendly to me.
examples.zh: 這裡每個人對我都很友善。

examples.en: Thank you for being so kind to me.
examples.zh: 謝謝你對我這麼好。

examples.en: She's a kind person who helps everyone.
examples.zh: 她是個幫助大家的善良人。

examples.en: My friend is really funny and makes me laugh.
examples.zh: 我朋友很有趣,總是逗我笑。

examples.en: That joke was so funny!
examples.zh: 那個笑話太好笑了!

examples.en: I'm so tired after a long day.
examples.zh: 漫長的一天後我好累。

examples.en: You look tired, get some rest.
examples.zh: 你看起來很累,去休息一下。

examples.en: I'm so bored, let's do something fun.
examples.zh: 我好無聊,我們來做點好玩的吧。

examples.en: He got bored waiting for the bus.
examples.zh: 他等公車等得很無聊。

examples.en: I'm so excited about the trip!
examples.zh: 我對這趟旅行超興奮的!

examples.en: The kids were excited to see the puppy.
examples.zh: 孩子們看到小狗很興奮。

examples.en: I'm worried about my exam tomorrow.
examples.zh: 我擔心明天的考試。

examples.en: Don't be worried, everything is fine.
examples.zh: 別擔心,一切都很好。

examples.en: She felt lonely on her first day at school.
examples.zh: 她上學第一天覺得很孤單。

examples.en: I get lonely when my friends are away.
examples.zh: 朋友不在時我會覺得孤單。

examples.en: I'm so proud of you for winning!
examples.zh: 你贏了,我好為你驕傲!

examples.en: She felt proud of her hard work.
examples.zh: 她為自己的努力感到自豪。

examples.en: He was jealous of his brother's new bike.
examples.zh: 他嫉妒哥哥的新腳踏車。

examples.en: Don't be jealous, you have talents too.
examples.zh: 別嫉妒,你也有你的長處。

examples.en: She feels confident before the interview.
examples.zh: 面試前她很有自信。

examples.en: Be confident and you'll do great.
examples.zh: 有自信一點,你會表現很好的。

examples.en: He's very generous and always shares his food.
examples.zh: 他很慷慨,總是分享食物。

examples.en: That was a generous gift, thank you.
examples.zh: 這禮物真大方,謝謝你。

examples.en: Please be honest with me about it.
examples.zh: 這件事請對我誠實。

examples.en: She's an honest person you can trust.
examples.zh: 她是個可以信任的誠實人。

examples.en: It's polite to say thank you.
examples.zh: 說謝謝是有禮貌的表現。

examples.en: He was very polite to the guests.
examples.zh: 他對客人很有禮貌。

examples.en: Don't be selfish, share with your sister.
examples.zh: 別自私,跟妹妹分享。

examples.en: He's too selfish to help others.
examples.zh: 他太自私了,不肯幫別人。

examples.en: She's outgoing and loves meeting new people.
examples.zh: 她很外向,喜歡認識新朋友。

examples.en: My brother is more outgoing than me.
examples.zh: 我弟弟比我外向。

examples.en: He's so stubborn and never changes his mind.
examples.zh: 他很固執,從不改變主意。

examples.en: Don't be stubborn, just listen to me.
examples.zh: 別固執了,聽我說。

examples.en: Please be patient, the bus is coming.
examples.zh: 請耐心一點,公車快來了。

examples.en: A good teacher is patient with students.
examples.zh: 好老師對學生有耐心。

examples.en: She has a cheerful smile every morning.
examples.zh: 她每天早上都帶著開朗的笑容。

examples.en: His cheerful mood made everyone happy.
examples.zh: 他開朗的心情讓大家都很快樂。

examples.en: She was upset about losing the game.
examples.zh: 輸了比賽讓她很難過。

examples.en: Are you upset with me?
examples.zh: 你在生我的氣嗎?

examples.en: I felt embarrassed when I forgot his name.
examples.zh: 忘了他的名字時我很難為情。

examples.en: She was embarrassed about her mistake.
examples.zh: 她為自己的錯誤感到難為情。

examples.en: Stay calm and take a deep breath.
examples.zh: 保持冷靜,深呼吸。

examples.en: She stayed calm during the emergency.
examples.zh: 緊急情況下她保持冷靜。

examples.en: I get along well with my roommates.
examples.zh: 我和室友相處得很好。

examples.en: Do you get along with your coworkers?
examples.zh: 你和同事處得來嗎?

examples.en: It's easy to make friends at this club.
examples.zh: 在這個社團很容易交到朋友。

examples.en: She made new friends on the first day.
examples.zh: 她第一天就交到了新朋友。

examples.en: Cheer up, tomorrow is a new day!
examples.zh: 振作點,明天又是新的一天!

examples.en: I brought cake to cheer you up.
examples.zh: 我帶了蛋糕來讓你開心。

examples.en: I'd love to get to know you better.
examples.zh: 我很想更了解你。

examples.en: It takes time to get to know someone.
examples.zh: 了解一個人需要時間。

examples.en: I agree with your idea completely.
examples.zh: 我完全同意你的想法。

examples.en: Do you agree with me on this?
examples.zh: 這件事你同意我嗎?

examples.en: I disagree, I think it's a bad plan.
examples.zh: 我不同意,我覺得這計畫不好。

examples.en: It's okay to disagree politely.
examples.zh: 有禮貌地表達不同意也沒關係。

examples.en: She gave me a nice compliment on my dress.
examples.zh: 她稱讚了我的洋裝。

examples.en: He complimented her cooking.
examples.zh: 他稱讚她的廚藝。

examples.en: I want to apologize for being late.
examples.zh: 我想為遲到道歉。

examples.en: He apologized to his friend right away.
examples.zh: 他馬上向朋友道歉。

examples.en: My parents always encourage me to try.
examples.zh: 我父母總是鼓勵我去嘗試。

examples.en: She encouraged him to keep going.
examples.zh: 她鼓勵他繼續下去。

examples.en: They love to gossip about celebrities.
examples.zh: 他們喜歡八卦明星的事。

examples.en: Don't believe every gossip you hear.
examples.zh: 別相信你聽到的每個八卦。

examples.en: They always argue about small things.
examples.zh: 他們總為小事爭吵。

examples.en: Let's not argue and just talk calmly.
examples.zh: 我們別吵了,冷靜談談吧。

examples.en: I trust you with my secret.
examples.zh: 我信任你,把秘密告訴你。

examples.en: Trust takes time to build.
examples.zh: 信任需要時間建立。

meaning: 情緒多變的、喜怒無常的

examples.en: He's been moody all week.
examples.zh: 他整個星期都情緒不穩。

examples.en: She gets moody when she's hungry.
examples.zh: 她餓的時候脾氣會變差。

examples.en: I'm so grateful for your help.
examples.zh: 我很感激你的幫忙。

examples.en: She felt grateful to have such good friends.
examples.zh: 她很感激能有這麼好的朋友。

examples.en: He's very sensitive about his weight.
examples.zh: 他對自己的體重很敏感。

examples.en: Try to be sensitive to her feelings.
examples.zh: 試著體諒她的感受。

examples.en: We chatted for hours over coffee.
examples.zh: 我們邊喝咖啡邊聊了好幾個小時。

examples.en: Let's have a quick chat later.
examples.zh: 我們晚點聊一下吧。

examples.en: She's a reliable friend I can count on.
examples.zh: 她是個我能依靠的可靠朋友。

examples.en: He's reliable and always keeps his word.
examples.zh: 他很可靠,總是說到做到。

examples.en: I was annoyed by the loud noise.
examples.zh: 那吵鬧聲讓我很惱火。

examples.en: She looked annoyed at his joke.
examples.zh: 她對他的玩笑感到惱火。

examples.en: We cheered her on during the race.
examples.zh: 比賽時我們為她加油。

examples.en: My family cheered me on at the game.
examples.zh: 比賽時家人為我加油。

examples.en: It took time for him to open up to us.
examples.zh: 他花了些時間才對我們敞開心扉。

examples.en: You can open up to me anytime.
examples.zh: 你隨時都可以對我坦白。

examples.en: He stood up for his friend at school.
examples.zh: 他在學校為朋友挺身而出。

examples.en: Always stand up for what you believe.
examples.zh: 永遠要為你的信念挺身而出。

examples.en: Do you take cash, or only cards?
examples.zh: 你們收現金,還是只收卡?

examples.en: I paid in cash to avoid the fee.
examples.zh: 我付現金以避免手續費。

examples.en: What's the price of this jacket?
examples.zh: 這件外套多少錢?

examples.en: The price went up last week.
examples.zh: 價格上週上漲了。

examples.en: I want to buy a new phone.
examples.zh: 我想買一支新手機。

examples.en: Let's buy some snacks for the trip.
examples.zh: 我們買些零食帶去旅行吧。

examples.en: They sell fresh fruit here.
examples.zh: 他們這裡賣新鮮水果。

examples.en: I want to sell my old bike.
examples.zh: 我想賣掉我的舊腳踏車。

examples.en: How do you want to pay?
examples.zh: 你想怎麼付款?

examples.en: I'll pay with my credit card.
examples.zh: 我會用信用卡付款。

examples.en: How much does it cost?
examples.zh: 這個要多少錢?

examples.en: The repair cost more than I expected.
examples.zh: 修理費比我預期的還多。

examples.en: The store closes at nine.
examples.zh: 這家店九點關門。

examples.en: Let's meet at the store entrance.
examples.zh: 我們在店門口碰面吧。

examples.en: These shoes are really cheap.
examples.zh: 這雙鞋真的很便宜。

examples.en: I found a cheap flight online.
examples.zh: 我在網上找到便宜的機票。

examples.en: That bag is too expensive for me.
examples.zh: 那個包對我來說太貴了。

examples.en: Coffee here is so expensive.
examples.zh: 這裡的咖啡好貴。

examples.en: I don't have enough money.
examples.zh: 我的錢不夠。

examples.en: Save your money for something better.
examples.zh: 把錢省下來買更好的東西。

examples.en: Here's your change, sir.
examples.zh: 先生,這是找您的錢。

examples.en: Keep the change.
examples.zh: 零錢不用找了。

examples.en: Can I pay by card?
examples.zh: 我可以刷卡嗎?

examples.en: My card was declined.
examples.zh: 我的卡被拒絕了。

examples.en: I love to shop on weekends.
examples.zh: 我喜歡週末購物。

examples.en: There's a nice shop around the corner.
examples.zh: 轉角有家不錯的店。

examples.en: The customer is always right.
examples.zh: 顧客永遠是對的。

examples.en: She's a regular customer here.
examples.zh: 她是這裡的常客。

examples.en: Please pay the cashier over there.
examples.zh: 請到那邊的收銀員那付款。

examples.en: The cashier gave me the wrong change.
examples.zh: 收銀員找錯錢給我了。

examples.en: Is there a discount for students?
examples.zh: 學生有折扣嗎?

examples.en: They offered a ten percent discount.
examples.zh: 他們給了九折的折扣。

examples.en: This coat was a real bargain.
examples.zh: 這件大衣真的很划算。

examples.en: You can bargain at the night market.
examples.zh: 在夜市你可以討價還價。

examples.en: Don't spend all your money at once.
examples.zh: 別一次把錢花光。

examples.en: I spent too much this month.
examples.zh: 我這個月花太多了。

examples.en: Buying in bulk helps you save.
examples.zh: 大量購買能幫你省錢。

examples.en: I'm saving up for a laptop.
examples.zh: 我正在存錢買筆電。

examples.en: I have a coupon for this item.
examples.zh: 我有這個商品的優惠券。

examples.en: The coupon expires tomorrow.
examples.zh: 這張優惠券明天到期。

examples.en: The line at checkout is long.
examples.zh: 結帳的隊伍很長。

examples.en: Proceed to checkout when you're ready.
examples.zh: 準備好就去結帳。

examples.en: Can I return this if it doesn't fit?
examples.zh: 如果不合身我可以退貨嗎?

examples.en: The return policy is thirty days.
examples.zh: 退貨政策是三十天。

examples.en: This laptop comes with a one-year warranty.
examples.zh: 這台筆電附一年保固。

examples.en: Is the phone still under warranty?
examples.zh: 這支手機還在保固期內嗎?

examples.en: Online shopping saves me a lot of time.
examples.zh: 網購幫我省了很多時間。

examples.en: She does most of her online shopping at night.
examples.zh: 她大多在晚上網購。

examples.en: Just add to cart and check out later.
examples.zh: 先加入購物車,晚點再結帳。

examples.en: I added three items to cart by mistake.
examples.zh: 我不小心加了三樣東西到購物車。

examples.en: Free shipping on orders over fifty dollars.
examples.zh: 訂單滿五十元免運費。

examples.en: Shipping takes about three days.
examples.zh: 運送大約要三天。

examples.en: The delivery arrived earlier than expected.
examples.zh: 貨比預期還早送到。

examples.en: I chose same-day delivery.
examples.zh: 我選了當日配送。

examples.en: Your cart is empty.
examples.zh: 你的購物車是空的。

examples.en: I left a few things in my cart.
examples.zh: 我在購物車裡留了幾樣東西。

examples.en: What brand is this bag?
examples.zh: 這個包是什麼牌子?

examples.en: I prefer this brand of coffee.
examples.zh: 我比較喜歡這個牌子的咖啡。

examples.en: The cash register isn't working.
examples.zh: 收銀機故障了。

examples.en: Please line up at the cash register.
examples.zh: 請在收銀機前排隊。

examples.en: Your total is thirty dollars.
examples.zh: 你的總額是三十元。

examples.en: What's the total after tax?
examples.zh: 含稅後總共多少?

examples.en: The price includes tax.
examples.zh: 價格已含稅。

examples.en: How much is the sales tax here?
examples.zh: 這裡的營業稅是多少?

examples.en: I left my wallet at home.
examples.zh: 我把錢包忘在家了。

examples.en: My wallet is almost empty.
examples.zh: 我的錢包快空了。

examples.en: Is this size in stock?
examples.zh: 這個尺寸有現貨嗎?

examples.en: Good news, it's back in stock.
examples.zh: 好消息,又有貨了。

examples.en: Sorry, that item is sold out.
examples.zh: 抱歉,那個商品賣完了。

examples.en: The concert tickets sold out fast.
examples.zh: 演唱會門票很快就賣完了。

examples.en: Can I try on these jeans?
examples.zh: 我可以試穿這條牛仔褲嗎?

examples.en: Try it on before you buy it.
examples.zh: 買之前先試穿一下。

examples.en: These are on the clearance rack.
examples.zh: 這些在清倉架上。

examples.en: I got it during the clearance sale.
examples.zh: 我在清倉特賣時買到的。

examples.en: Can I pay in monthly installments?
examples.zh: 我可以按月分期付款嗎?

examples.en: The first installment is due next week.
examples.zh: 第一期款項下週到期。

examples.en: That restaurant is totally overpriced.
examples.zh: 那家餐廳定價太高了。

examples.en: These headphones feel overpriced.
examples.zh: 這副耳機感覺定價過高。

examples.en: I track my monthly expenses in an app.
examples.zh: 我用App記錄每月開銷。

examples.en: Rent is my biggest expense.
examples.zh: 房租是我最大的開銷。

examples.en: Join our loyalty program to earn points.
examples.zh: 加入我們的會員計畫來累積點數。

examples.en: Their loyalty program has great perks.
examples.zh: 他們的會員計畫有很棒的優惠。

examples.en: You'll get a gift with any purchase.
examples.zh: 任何消費都能得到贈品。

examples.en: I regret this purchase already.
examples.zh: 我已經後悔這次購買了。

examples.en: That model is out of stock right now.
examples.zh: 那個型號現在缺貨。

examples.en: They're out of stock until next month.
examples.zh: 他們要到下個月才有貨。

examples.en: The price tag says forty dollars.
examples.zh: 價格標籤上寫四十元。

examples.en: Don't forget to remove the price tag.
examples.zh: 別忘了拆掉價格標籤。

examples.en: That dress was a total impulse buy.
examples.zh: 那件洋裝完全是衝動購物。

examples.en: Avoid impulse buys at the checkout.
examples.zh: 避免在結帳處衝動購物。

examples.en: I cancelled my streaming subscription.
examples.zh: 我取消了串流訂閱。

examples.en: The subscription renews every month.
examples.zh: 訂閱每個月自動續約。

examples.en: I'll use my debit card instead of cash.
examples.zh: 我用金融卡代替現金付。

examples.en: The debit card deducts money directly.
examples.zh: 金融卡會直接扣款。

examples.en: Is this deposit refundable?
examples.zh: 這筆訂金可以退款嗎?

examples.en: The tickets are non-refundable.
examples.zh: 這些票不可退款。

examples.en: I tend to overspend during sales.
examples.zh: 我在特賣時容易超支。

examples.en: Try not to overspend this holiday.
examples.zh: 這個假期盡量別超支。
